completed_tasks.name: 06-07: Add make docs-test target + GitHub Actions workflow
Post-phase: Qwen3Reranker + title in rerank input

decisions.decision: Use sqlite_vec.load() for cross-platform sqlite-vec extension loading
decisions.rationale: macOS load_extension('vec0') fails; sqlite_vec Python package handles platform detection

decisions.decision: Default embedding model: Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B via ModelScope
decisions.rationale: Chinese-accessible hub, 1024-dim, supports both Chinese and English
Standard CrossEncoder fails with tensor reshape error on this model; yes/no logits approach works

decisions.decision: Include document title in reranker input text
decisions.rationale: RRF discards original BM25 scores; reranker needs title signal to boost exact-match documents

decisions.decision: Dedup hybrid results by document_id keeping highest score
decisions.rationale: Vector search operates at chunk level, same document can appear multiple times in fused results

next_action: Consider /gsd-complete-milestone for v1.0, or start Phase 7 (LLM query expansion)
context_notes: All 6 GSD phases complete. Post-phase ad-hoc fixes committed and pushed. GSD updated to 1.38.1. Test suite passes (377 passed, 11 skipped).
